role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained neutral; did not hallucinate scripts.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on soil color, vegetation, and terrain as requested.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (palms, broadleaf) and soil indicators.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed utility poles and road infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (pole design, roof tiles, image quality) effectively.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Brazil. The agents adhered to their roles, providing consistent evidence (red soil, palms, specific utility poles) that converged on the correct answer. The meta agent played a crucial role in distinguishing the infrastructure style.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Red soil and vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Concrete poles and dirt road match.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Image quality and infrastructure style match.
